---
title: "Colonel the Hon. John Colborne"
---

## Colonel the Hon. John Colborne

**Dates:** (1830-1890)

### Description

cousin of CMY, younger son of the 1st Lord Seaton,  a colonel in the Egyptian Army.

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 17th [1885] 

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
